creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Santhosh Raju from comment #5)

That's fine, anything that is a candidate for merging is fine being bundled in with other updates, that being: anything that isn't a feature/version-only update, unless its also a security update.

Thank you for clarifying, you can help by explicitly mentioning whether a version update is a bugfix/security release, or includes only bugfixes/security changes.

The changelog list and github compare link wasn't clear about the security change

If you could provide a security/vuxml entry for this that would be great.
